---
title: "Stability Simulations"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Setup

```{r setup, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)


# Check and install required packages
required_packages <- c(
  "lhs", "dplyr", "purrr", "igraph", "ggplot2", "tibble", "doFuture","devtools","abc", "tidyverse"
)
for (pkg in required_packages) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(pkg, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
  }
  require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
}


# Install meweasmo from GitHub if not installed
if (!requireNamespace("meweasmo", quietly = TRUE)) {
  devtools::install_github("lsaravia/meweasmo")
}
library(meweasmo)

# Install multiweb from GitHub if not installed
if (!requireNamespace("multiweb", quietly = TRUE)) {
  devtools::install_github("lsaravia/multiweb")
}
library(multiweb)

source("R/network_fun.r")

# load network_info
network_info <- readRDS("Data/network_info.rds")

# All networks with "std" ones 
#network_info <- network_info %>% filter(!(site %in% c("WeddellSea","BeagleChannel")))
# Only networks with "std" in the site name
#network_info <- network_info %>% filter(grepl("std", site, ignore.case = TRUE))

```

## Parameter Ranges and Simulation Settings and Run Simulations

```{r simulStability4060, eval=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=TRUE}
stability_results <- readRDS("Data/stability_results.rds") 

#network_info <- anti_join(network_info, stability_results %>% filter(QSS>=0.05), by = "site")
#network_info <- filter(network_info, site=="NorthernScotia")
unique(network_info$site)

# Parameter ranges (adjust as needed)
require(future)
num_cores <- future::availableCores()
plan(multisession, workers = num_cores)  # or your preferred plan

# Run the stability analysis
stability_res <- calculate_network_stability_parallel(network_info$igraph, network_info$site,
                                                          nsim = 10000,
                                                          selfDamping_range = seq(-40, -60, by = -1))


plan(sequential)  # Reset to sequential plan after parallel processing

# Join to the metadata
# network_info <- dplyr::left_join(network_info, stability_results, by = "site")
## Fit Metaweb Assembly Model

stability_results <- stability_results %>% bind_rows(stability_res)
saveRDS(stability_results, "Data/stability_results.rds")
```

# Plot Stability Results

```{r PlotStabilityResults, eval=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=TRUE}

#
#
ggplot(stability_results, aes(x = selfDamping, y = QSS)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = site), color = "gray70") +
  geom_point(aes(color = QSS), size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~ site, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C", end = 0.9) +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "reverse") +  # reverse axis so -1 is rightmost
  labs(
    title = "QSS vs Self-Damping by Site",
    x = "Self-Damping",
    y = "QSS"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

# Filter around the QSS ≈ 0.05 threshold (e.g., between 0.03 and 0.07)
near_qss <- stability_results %>%
  filter(QSS >= 0.00 & QSS <= 0.1)

# Plot MEing_stable vs selfDamping
ggplot(near_qss, aes(x = selfDamping, y = MEing_stable)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = site), color = "gray60") +
  geom_point(aes(color = QSS), size = 2.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ site, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "B", end = 0.9) +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "reverse") +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Real Part of Max Eigenvalue vs Self-Damping",
    subtitle = "Filtered near QSS ≈ 0.05",
    x = "Self-Damping",
    y = "MEing (stable matrices only)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

# Save the plot 
```

# Interpolate Self-Damping at QSS = 0.05

```{r InterpolateSelfDamping, eval=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=TRUE}

stability_results <- readRDS("Data/stability_results.rds") %>% filter( !(site %in% c("SouthernScotia","NorthernScotia")))
unique(stability_results$site)

# Function to perform interpolation for one site

# Function to perform interpolation for one site
interpolate_selfDamping <- function(df_site, target_qss = 0.05) {
  df_site <- df_site %>% arrange(selfDamping)
  
  # Find pairs of rows where QSS crosses the threshold
  i <- which(diff(df_site$QSS > target_qss) != 0)
  
  if (length(i) == 0) return(tibble(site = df_site$site[1], selfDamping_interp = NA_real_))
  
  # Use the first crossing
  i <- i[1]
  x0 <- df_site$QSS[i]
  x1 <- df_site$QSS[i + 1]
  y0 <- df_site$selfDamping[i]
  y1 <- df_site$selfDamping[i + 1]
  
  # Linear interpolation formula
  slope <- (y1 - y0) / (x1 - x0)
  y_interp <- y0 + slope * (target_qss - x0)
  
  tibble(site = df_site$site[1], selfDamping = y_interp)
}

# Apply interpolation per site
selfDamping_at_qss05 <- stability_results %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  group_split() %>%
  map_dfr(~ interpolate_selfDamping(.x, target_qss = 0.05))

selfDamping_at_qss05
network_info <- network_info %>% inner_join(selfDamping_at_qss05)
saveRDS(network_info, "Data/network_info.rds")

```

# Calc Max eigenvalues for Self-Damping at QSS = 0.05

```{r calcEigenSelfDamping, eval=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=TRUE}

#network_info <- readRDS("Data/network_info.rds") 

require(future)
num_cores <- future::availableCores()
plan(multisession, workers = num_cores)  # or your preferred plan

stability_results_meig <- simulate_qss_fixed_selfDamping(
  networks = network_info$igraph,
  sites = network_info$site,
  selfDamping_values = network_info$selfDamping,
  nsim = 10000
)
plan(sequential)  # Reset to sequential plan after parallel processing

saveRDS(stability_results_meig, "Data/stability_results_meig.rds")

```
